requestBody: {"TABLE":"network_map","DATABASE":"flow_metrics","DATA_SOURCE":"1m","QUERIES":[{"QUERY_ID":"R1-R1","ROLES":["R","R"],"SELECT":"newTag('R1-R1') as query_id, (PerSecond(Avg(`byte`))*8) AS `流量速率`, Avg(`retrans_ratio`) AS `TCP 重传比例`, Avg(`tcp_establish_fail_ratio`) AS `TCP 建连失败比例`, Avg(`rtt`) AS `TCP 建连时延`, node_type(auto_service_0) AS `client_node_type`, icon_id(auto_service_0) AS `client_icon_id`, auto_service_id_0, auto_service_0, is_internet_0, node_type(auto_service_1) AS `server_node_type`, icon_id(auto_service_1) AS `server_icon_id`, auto_service_id_1, auto_service_1, is_internet_1","TAGS":["node_type(auto_service_0) AS `client_node_type`","icon_id(auto_service_0) AS `client_icon_id`","auto_service_id_0","auto_service_0","is_internet_0","node_type(auto_service_1) AS `server_node_type`","icon_id(auto_service_1) AS `server_icon_id`","auto_service_id_1","auto_service_1","is_internet_1"],"CTAGS":["node_type(auto_service_0) AS `client_node_type`","icon_id(auto_service_0) AS `client_icon_id`","auto_service_id_0","auto_service_0","is_internet_0"],"STAGS":["node_type(auto_service_1) AS `server_node_type`","icon_id(auto_service_1) AS `server_icon_id`","auto_service_id_1","auto_service_1","is_internet_1"],"METRICS":["(PerSecond(Avg(`byte`))*8) AS `流量速率`","Avg(`retrans_ratio`) AS `TCP 重传比例`","Avg(`tcp_establish_fail_ratio`) AS `TCP 建连失败比例`","Avg(`rtt`) AS `TCP 建连时延`"],"GROUP_BY":"auto_service_0, is_internet_0, auto_service_id_0, `client_node_type`, auto_service_1, is_internet_1, auto_service_id_1, `server_node_type`"}],"SORT":{"ORDER_BY":"流量速率","SORTED_BY":"DESC"},"TOP":"50","time_end":1784627670,"time_start":1784626770}
